title: CashMint — Token Minting Platform for Bitcoin Cash
description: Fund the development of CashMint, a user-friendly CashTokens minting platform built on Bitcoin Cash. CashMint enables anyone to create, manage, and broadcast CashTokens with ease using the MintCore SDK.

milestones.title: MintCore SDK — Core Release
milestones.description: Publish the MintCore TypeScript SDK to npm with full CashTokens genesis support, multi-provider UTXO handling, BCMR metadata, and a comprehensive 62-test suite.

milestones.title: CashMint Web App — Beta
milestones.description: Launch the CashMint web application with wallet integration (Electron Cash, Paytaca), allowing users to mint FT and NFT CashTokens without writing code.

milestones.title: Post-Genesis Token Operations
milestones.description: Add token minting (post-genesis), token melting, and multi-sig support to MintCore and CashMint.

milestones.title: CLI Tools & Browser-Optimized Build
milestones.description: Release a command-line interface for MintCore and produce a browser-optimized bundle for easy integration into any BCH dApp.

milestones.title: SLP → CashTokens Migration Helpers
milestones.description: Build migration tooling to help existing SLP token projects migrate their metadata and workflows to CashTokens.
